summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lucky Jack Swiss Lotto app and new EuroMillions Pattern Analyzer API. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with ball machine animation, Lucky wheel, personalization, lock positions, and multiple tickets features all working correctly.
passed_tests: EuroMillions /api/euromillions/health returns healthy status
EuroMillions /api/euromillions/draws returns 262 seeded records
EuroMillions draws have correct structure (5 numbers 1-50, 2 stars 1-12)
EuroMillions /api/euromillions/stats returns statistical analysis
EuroMillions stats includes number_frequency, star_frequency, gaps, distributions
EuroMillions POST /api/euromillions/master-predictor generates valid predictions
EuroMillions master-predictor supports multiple tickets (1-20)
EuroMillions master-predictor with birthday parameter uses Birthday pattern
EuroMillions master-predictor with name parameter uses Name Energy pattern
EuroMillions master-predictor respects locked positions
EuroMillions /api/euromillions/analyze-ticket validates and scores tickets
EuroMillions analyze-ticket rejects invalid number count
EuroMillions analyze-ticket rejects invalid star values
Swiss Lotto /api/ root endpoint working
Swiss Lotto /api/dashboard returns draws and statistics
Swiss Lotto /api/master-predictor returns 6 numbers (1-42)
Frontend: Lucky Jack title and Swiss Lotto subtitle visible
Frontend: Ball machine with 42 floating balls
Frontend: Lucky wheel with numbers 1-6
Frontend: Get New Numbers button triggers animation
Frontend: Personalize Your Numbers section with birthday/name inputs
Frontend: Lock Positions section with P1-P6 inputs
Frontend: Multiple Tickets section with ticket count selector
Frontend: Bonus Numbers section expandable
test_credentials: None required - MongoDB runs locally without auth
seed_data_creation: EuroMillions: 262 draws seeded from 2014-2016 historical data
context_for_next_testing_agent: EuroMillions API fully integrated at /api/euromillions/* endpoints. Features: 1) /health - returns healthy status, 2) /draws - returns 262 seeded draws with 5 numbers (1-50) + 2 stars (1-12), 3) /stats - returns comprehensive statistical analysis, 4) POST /master-predictor - generates predictions with birthday/name/locked positions support, 5) /analyze-ticket - validates and scores user tickets. Swiss Lotto app remains fully functional with ball machine, Lucky wheel, personalization, lock positions, and multiple tickets features.
